content: Phase 3a: Strict filter for BTC Up or Down 5m markets only
Phase 3b: Auto-cycle through 5m markets (pick next when current expires)
Phase 3c: Target price snapshot at market entry + correct fair-value model
Phase 3d: Position settlement at window expiry (not just TP/SL)
Phase 3e: CLOB-lag detector as primary edge (model edges marked as display-only)
Phase 3f: Realistic paper fills (mid) + correct TP/SL exit prices + cooldown
Phase 3g: UI improvements - Target/Spot cards, lag details, LIVE setup guide, edge type badge
Phase 3 testing: end-to-end check via testing_agent_v3 with the new auto-cycle + lag flow
